title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Marina Gregg expresses intense fear and paranoia to her husband, Jason Rad, following the deaths of Ella and Giuseppe. She believes an unknown enemy is targeting her, citing a suspicious incident at a movie company where she suspects her coffee was poisoned. Marina voices suspicion toward Ella, believing Ella hated her due to her love for Jason, though she acknowledges that Ella is dead. While Jason attempts to comfort Marina and promises to ensure her safety, Marina observes that his expression becomes strange, resembling a "clown laughing at something extremely sad," when he swears to care for her until the end. To calm herself, Marina requests a yellow pill.

The following day, Chief Inspector Craiglockhart visits Miss Marple, feeling disheartened by the two murders that occurred within twenty-four hours. Miss Marple provides him with whisky and soda to help him relax. During their conversation, DeMortimer Craddock (referred to as Dermot) and Miss Marple discuss the investigation. Miss Marple suggests that the murderer is often the most obvious person, such as a spouse. While Dermot argues that Jason Rad is truly in love with Marina, Miss Marple notes that although Jason is a wealthy man with no obvious motive to kill his wife, investigators must look "around the edges" of the case. She concludes that while the investigation might naturally focus on the husband, the true culprit remains difficult to find.
